options.name: --template
options.description:
Path to custom template file. Overrides value specified in
custom settings file.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Comma separated change types to exclude. Overrides value
specified in custom settings file.

options.name: --minVersion
options.description:
The minimum version of the changelog, will not include
changes lower than this version. Overrides value specified
in custom settings file.

options.name: --repository
options.description:
Path to repository root. Defaults to execution directory.
Overrides value specified in custom settings file.

options.name: --fileSource
options.description:
Path to file source. Overrides value specified in custom
settings file.
